examples: The gas switch with coaxal field distortion electrodes used in type DPF-300 current pulse discharge system is introduced.
Based on conformal transform method and point matching method, a method to calculate the coaxal line characteristic resistance is presented.
Multidimensional axisymmetric folded-combined cavity which produces combined beams by a common output lens is made up with several folded cavities and a coaxal sphere cavity.
